title: Verify mutual exclusivity with other onboarding experiments
description: Tests that a user assigned to the Trial Corner experiment is not simultaneously shown other conflicting experiments.
preconditions: Multiple experiments are active: 'Trial Corner', 'Onboarding Flow A', 'Post-Trial Offer B'.
A new user qualifies for all three experiments.

steps.description: 1. Create a new user who activates a trial and does not consume content in the first 5 minutes, ensuring they are assigned to the 'Trial Corner' cohort.
2. Navigate through the app, specifically to areas where other experiments would be triggered.
3. Verify that the user is NOT shown 'Onboarding Flow A'.
4. Verify that the user is NOT shown prompts for 'Post-Trial Offer B'.

expected_result: The user is only exposed to the 'Trial Corner' experience. The system correctly enforces the mutual exclusivity rule, preventing a confusing or broken user experience.
